headline: How The Grab Holdings (GRAB) Investment Story Is Shifting With Valuation Support And Profitability Debates
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for Grab Holdings has been adjusted slightly, moving from about US$6.65 to roughly US$6.55. This small shift lines up with mixed analyst commentary, where more upbeat views point to valuation support and a clearer profitability framework, while cautious voices focus on execution risk and the assumptions sitting behind those targets. As you read on, you will see how these differing views shape the evolving narrative around Grab and what to watch as the story...

headline: Berkshire Cuts Bank Of America Stake While Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Berkshire Hathaway, led by new CEO Greg Abel, has significantly reduced its stake in Bank of America. The change follows a wider reshuffling of Berkshire's portfolio that affects several large holdings. Bank of America, trading as NYSE:BAC, last closed at $49.81. For Bank of America shareholders, the move comes at a time when the stock has seen mixed recent performance. NYSE:BAC is down 4.8% over the past week and 8.5% over the past month, with a year-to-date decline of 11.0%. Over a longer...
